value: Shipped in v1.10.0 (#54): file-per-entry layout. Each entry lives in .codexcli/<namespace>.<name>.json with shape {value, meta:{created, updated}}. Sidecars: .codexcli/_aliases.json, _confirm.json, _epoch.json (seqlock generation for torn-read detection added in #58), _README.md (hand-edit warning added in #58). Replaces single .codexcli.json (auto-migrated via atomic tmp-dir-rename, old file renamed to .backup). Migration runs under withFileLock to serialize concurrent first-runs (#58). In v1.11.x, withFileLock fails closed in production — set CODEX_DISABLE_LOCKING=1 for tests that intentionally exercise unlocked paths (#61). In-memory shape returned by store.ts is preserved — consumers above the store layer don't change. Key validation via isValidEntryKey (in src/utils/directoryStore.ts) rejects path traversal, prototype pollution, and sidecar name collisions. Hand-editing files unsupported (see conventions.editSurface).
